## start_transcription_job

Starts a transcription job using the job manager and returns the
in-progress UI.

------------------------------------------------------------------------

<a
href="https://github.com/cj-mills/cjm-fasthtml-workflow-transcription-single-file/blob/main/cjm_fasthtml_workflow_transcription_single_file/workflow/job_handler.py#L111"
target="_blank" style="float:right; font-size:smaller">source</a>

### start_transcription_job

>  start_transcription_job (state:Dict[str,Any], request, config:cjm_fasthtm
>                               l_workflow_transcription_single_file.core.config
>                               .SingleFileWorkflowConfig, router,
>                               transcription_manager, plugin_registry:cjm_fasth
>                               tml_workflow_transcription_single_file.core.prot
>                               ocols.PluginRegistryProtocol)

\*Handle workflow completion by starting the transcription job.

Called by StepFlow’s `on_complete` handler when the user confirms and
clicks “Start Transcription”.\*
